flags.message: Cell mode is 'forward' but the provisioned snapshot already shows the case terminated: the docket's only entry (No. 26, 2024-09-20) is 'Case termination for order and judgment' and an opinion cluster (10122744) is linked. The case was decided ~22 months before this run, so the cell is effectively a replay mislabeled as forward. I did not open the cluster, the termination document, or any outcome-revealing source, and predicted from the pre-decision record plus base rates; the disposition's direction remains unknown to me. The snapshot is also unusually thin (single docket entry, no parties/panel/nature-of-suit).

The configured CourtListener MCP server was down for this cell: every call (call_endpoint, search) returned a server-side 'REDIS_URL is not set; cannot access session store' error. Retrieval of the pre-decision docket entries and party/counsel detail was impossible; the prediction rests on the provisioned snapshot, the committed statpack, and fedcourts corpus queries (which have no Social Security priors for ca10).
